AI_Infrastructure.description: AI算力基础设施全产业链映射图谱

upstream_compute.role: GPU/ASIC设计与制造，算力核心供应商
upstream_compute.note: 已被华尔街充分定价，上车超额赔率极低

optical_transceivers.role: 800G/1.6T硅光模块，万卡集群互联速率瓶颈
optical_transceivers.deduction: GPU集群规模越大，对光互联带宽需求呈指数增长。二线厂筹码结构最干净

networking.role: 数据中心交换机与网络架构

midstream_cooling.role: 液冷与热管理，高密度GPU集群的散热刚需

downstream_memory.role: 企业级SSD/HBM，大模型推理的高并发随机读取瓶颈
downstream_memory.deduction: 超大参数预训练与推理需要极高并发IO，HBM3E产能受限带来强定价权

downstream_cloud.deduction: CSP产能不足时的溢出需求承接者，CoreWeave IPO后的定价重估

power_nuclear.role: 核电基荷电力，数据中心长期稳定电力PPA
power_nuclear.deduction: 数据中心用电量爆炸增长，可再生能源无法提供稳定基荷，核电SMR是唯一解

application_ai.role: AI应用落地，卫星遥感数据+AI推理平台
application_ai.deduction: 海量卫星数据+AI推理能力=地球智能平台，市场严重低估其数据资产价值重估潜力

deductionChainTemplates: GPU demand surge (NVDA) → Optical interconnect bottleneck (AAOI, LITE) → Enterprise SSD/HBM demand (WDC, MU)
Government AI infrastructure bill → Data center buildout → Stable baseload power → Nuclear SMR (SMR, OKLO, CEG)
AI inference scaling → GPU rental demand overflow → CoreWeave (CRWV) revenue explosion
Satellite data volume explosion → AI-powered analytics platform → Planet Labs (PL) value re-rating
